ProjectionExec: output_bytes=1
  AggregateExec: output_bytes=1
    CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=32
      HashJoinExec: output_bytes=32
        CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=6064
          FilterExec: output_bytes=6064
            ParquetExec: output_bytes=2500000
        CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=1091156
          FilterExec: output_bytes=1091240
            ParquetExec: output_bytes=52510632
